21:41 â December 30, 2021
Update to the Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the
Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
, as announced in the
2022 Indicative Pricing for Digital and Payment Services
notice published September 29, 2021. Additional changes are described
here
.
The Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only. The fee changes come into effect January 1, 2022.
Document Library
Status
Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule
2725
Details are provided in the news item attachment.
We updated the name of the fee schedule to better clarify that it applies to Class A credit unions only.
